all.prompt: Which soccer showdown is kicking off the World Cup's second round like a caffeinated kangaroo?
all.summary: France faces Paraguay in the World Cup Round of 16, starting the knockout stage with high stakes.

all.prompt: Prince Harry is flying solo to London—who's ditching the plane tickets with him?
all.summary: Prince Harry will travel to London without Meghan Markle and their children, reportedly due to security funding issues.

all.prompt: Beyond the headlines of Camp Mystic, who else is silently struggling after Texas floods?
all.summary: Other survivors of the Texas floods, not just those at Camp Mystic, have faced quieter trauma in the aftermath.

all.prompt: How long did it take for massive crowds to gather in Tehran for Khamenei's funeral—a long weekend or a full work week?
all.summary: Massive crowds gathered in Tehran for a six-day funeral for Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei.

all.prompt: Which NBA trade rumor won't stop spinning, even on a holiday—Trey Murphy, Anthony Davis, or a Lakers deal?
options: Trey Murphy, Anthony Davis, and Lakers deals
Stephen Curry traded for a pizza
all.summary: NBA trade rumors continue to swirl, including talks about Trey Murphy, Anthony Davis, and potential Lakers deals.

general.summary: France faces Paraguay in the World Cup Round of 16, starting the knockout stage with high stakes.

general.summary: Prince Harry will travel to London without Meghan Markle and their children, reportedly due to security funding issues.

general.prompt: Beyond the headlines of Camp Mystic, who else is silently struggling after Texas floods?
general.summary: Other survivors of the Texas floods, not just those at Camp Mystic, have faced quieter trauma in the aftermath.

general.prompt: How long did it take for massive crowds to gather in Tehran for Khamenei's funeral—a long weekend or a full work week?
general.summary: Massive crowds gathered in Tehran for a six-day funeral for Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei.

options: Trey Murphy, Anthony Davis, and Lakers deals
Stephen Curry traded for a pizza

tech.prompt: Fireworks for your wallet! Which brand is NOT included in the scorching 4th of July sales that promise up to 70% off?
tech.summary: The best 4th of July sales offer up to 70% off on brands like Apple, Yeti, and Medicube.

tech.prompt: Why is your wallet crying every time you buy a new video game? What's the main villain behind those skyrocketing prices?
tech.summary: Video game prices are rising due to ballooning development budgets and digital distribution trends.

tech.prompt: Apple's secret weapon for turning your iPhone into a kid-friendly 'dumb phone' is hidden where? What's the feature nobody's talking about?
options: The 'School Time' mode in Screen Time
tech.summary: Apple built a tool for people with cognitive disabilities that can also turn an iPhone into an ideal kids' dumb phone.

tech.prompt: For just $5, you can turn your old Android phone into which blast-from-the-past music player? What's the nostalgic gadget?
tech.summary: The NostalgicPod app can turn an old Android phone into a modern-day iPod Classic for $5.

tech.prompt: Which gorgeous Android launcher is basically dead, and who's the villain behind its demise?
tech.summary: Stario Launcher, a promising Android launcher, is shutting down due to Google's incoming app and developer policies.

business.prompt: It's so hot outside that even the power grid is throwing in the towel! How many people are currently sweating in the dark across the US thanks to this scorching heatwave?
options: Just 100,000, but they're very loud about it
business.summary: Nearly 1 million people are without power nationwide as a brutal heatwave blankets the US.

business.prompt: Axios says America is doing something right (shocking, we know). According to them, what's our winning secret?
options: We’re really good at avoiding small talk
We invented the internet (and then broke it)
business.summary: Axios argues that what America gets right is that it's still young and learning.

business.prompt: This ice cream shop has been scooping since Lincoln was president. How many generations have kept this small business curse-beating streak alive?
business.summary: A sixth-generation owner leads a Philadelphia ice cream business that has survived 165 years with new flavors and global exports.

business.prompt: An MP is calling it 'disgraceful' — and honestly, we agree. What has been offline for THREE DAYS in Maghull, driving everyone bananas?
options: The sewer system (it's a whole mess)
business.summary: MP Bill Esterson says people in Maghull have been without internet for three days due to sewer repairs.

business.prompt: Trump Accounts just landed on July 4th like a financial fireworks show. What exactly are these things that are now live and ready for kids?
options: A subscription service for gold-plated sneakers
A line of collectible trading cards
New federal savings and investment vehicles for children
A new app that just posts his greatest hits
business.summary: Trump Accounts, a new federal savings and investment vehicle for children, went live on July 4.

sports.prompt: Which soccer-mad nation is kicking off Round of 16 chaos by facing Paraguay?
sports.summary: France plays Paraguay in the first match of the World Cup Round of 16.

sports.prompt: Which NBA superstar is swirling in trade rumors alongside Lakers deals and a 'Big Board'?
sports.summary: Anthony Davis is one of the players mentioned in recent NBA trade rumors.

sports.prompt: At the British Grand Prix, who zoomed past Lewis Hamilton to snatch the sprint race win?
sports.summary: Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli passed Lewis Hamilton to win the Silverstone sprint race.

sports.prompt: England is heading to Mexico’s Azteca — what makes this stadium a wheeze-inducing challenge?
sports.summary: The Azteca is 2,240 metres above sea level, making the thin air hard to breathe.

sports.prompt: BBC ranked every team left in the World Cup — which squad might be unfairly stuck in the middle?
sports.summary: BBC Sport ranked the 16 remaining World Cup teams, sparking debate over Argentina, Norway, and England's spots.

science.prompt: What did NASA's Chandra telescope use to measure the Milky Way's outer limits — a cosmic ruler or a really angry star?
options: The footsteps of a supermassive black hole
science.summary: NASA's Chandra telescope detected rare gamma-ray bursts to measure the Milky Way's spiral arms with stunning accuracy, revealing the galaxy's outer reaches may extend farther than previously known.

science.prompt: How long will Apollo astronauts' footprints stay on the Moon — until the next lunar dust storm or until the Sun forgets to rise?
options: Forever, because time stops on the Moon
science.summary: Apollo astronauts' bootprints on the lunar surface will remain undisturbed for at least ten million years due to the Moon's lack of wind, rain, or erosion.

science.prompt: Why is a Martian rock loaded with carbon — because Martians left a barbecue grill out, or something more scientific?
options: Space trash from a passing comet
science.summary: A Martian rock contains high levels of carbon, which could be explained by biological processes, but other non-biological explanations are also possible.

science.prompt: China's Tianwen-2 just arrived at Earth's 'quasi moon' — is it time to update our celestial roommate agreement?
options: Turn it into a space gas station
Plant a flag and claim it for China
Collect samples and test its lunar origins
Take a selfie with Earth in the background
science.summary: China's Tianwen-2 spacecraft has arrived at Kamoʻoalewa, a tiny quasi-satellite of Earth, to collect samples and investigate its possible lunar origins.

science.prompt: Astronomers found a potentially habitable planet next door — should we start packing our bags or just wave hello?
options: A star with a 'For Sale' sign
A mini-Mars with alien welcome mats
A planet made entirely of cheese
An exoplanet twice the size of Earth
science.summary: Astronomers discovered an exoplanet approximately twice the size of Earth that is potentially habitable and located in Earth's cosmic neighborhood.
